title: 🔮 LORE DIALOGUE & SECRET CURIO COLLECTIBLES
items: Dialogue Tuning: Added a top-right settings icon in the NPC Dialogue panel to toggle haptic ticks and choose typewriter speeds (Instant, Fast, Normal, Slow).
5 Secret Delivery Quests: Added special Gungeon delivery storylines for Flynt, Vampire, Sell Creep, Professor Goopton, and Cursula.
The 3 Gungeon Anomalies: Gather the Myconid Blank-Cap (Red Mushroom), Aurum Ammo-Nugget (Gold Nugget), and Chrono-Trigger Sprocket (Golden Gear) from other merchants.
Bello's Secret Cabinet: Deliver anomalies to Bello's secret cabinet to unlock a permanent, cumulative 30% price discount on his cost calculator widget.
Cursula Flirting Engine: Playful, witty, and alien flirting lines that match Cursula's dark purple, shadow-bounded Gungeon personality.

title: 🎲 GUNFORTUNA DIEL DIALOG SKINS
items: Customizer Dropdown: Select beautiful dice skins (Classic, Gold, Frost, Molten, Void, Toxic) in-place before rolling.
Huntress HUD Fix: Resolved a collapsed-height bug to restore complete item inventory and grid visibility.
Dog Strip: Grounded dog movements to move horizontally only on top of option widgets.
Speech Popups: Added dedicated animated speech bubbles that float directly near the dog.
Filter UI Upgrades: Grid-mode filter visibility improvements and double-height category tags.

title: 🎯 INTERACTIVE WINCHESTER CAMPAIGN
items: Chamber Progression: 10-level campaign replacing standard target shooting variants.
Dual-Thumb Controls: BAM! fire button paired with PlayStation-style Analog Aiming stick.
Dog Treat Cookie Throw: Paths active treats for Dog to run and eat.
Baby Good Mimic Synergy: Co-op purple-tinted twin companion dog with independent AI roaming.

title: 🤖 THE ROBOT OVERHAUL & PERSISTENCE
items: No-Hearts Armor Engine: Dynamic armor display replace hearts dashboard widget.
Junk Damage Recycler: Live calculation of +5% damage per Junk item carried.
Advanced Y-Perspectives: Smooth 3D card-flip rotations with spring-back easing.

title: 📦 CORE GUNGEONMATE RELEASE
items: Rich Item Database: Comprehensive offline access to all 239 guns, 270 items, and 395 synergies.
Single-Device Persistence: Auto-saves active runs so you never lose progress.
Local Multiplayer Sync: Bluetooth/Wi-Fi event-driven co-op state sync for dual player runs.
Winchester's Minigame: Fully playable billiard-physics target-shooting simulator.
